mapper.select: SELECT txn_id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, gmt_complete, payer_account_id, payee_account_id, amount, currency, type, status, failure_reason, ext_info FROM transaction WHERE txn_id = #{txnId} AND (payer_account_id = #{accountId} OR payee_account_id = #{accountId}) LIMIT 1

SELECT txn_id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, gmt_complete, payer_account_id, payee_account_id, amount, currency, type, status, failure_reason, ext_info FROM transaction WHERE txn_id = #{txnId} ORDER BY gmt_create DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{pageNo}
